# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No reviewable implementation changes were found. `git diff` shows changes only in `.ralph-burning/` files (`.ralph-burning/projects/9ni911-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni911-1/run.json`), which are explicitly excluded from review scope per project instructions; therefore no code-level correctness/safety/robustness findings could be assessed in this pass.

## Amendments

None.
